rule.name: AvoidCatchingNPE
rule.message: Avoid catching NullPointerException; consider removing the cause of the NPE.
rule.description:
Code should never throw NullPointerExceptions under normal circumstances. A catch block may hide the original error, causing other, more subtle problems later on.
**Deprecated:** This rule is deprecated since PMD 7.18.0 and will be removed with PMD 8.0.0. This rule has been subsumed by {% rule AvoidCatchingGenericException %}, which is now configurable as to which exceptions cause a violation.
